underlying: Colorado U.S. Senate 2026 D-R margin in pp (Hickenlooper D incumbent vs GOP nominee)
method: AUDIT FIX 2026-04-29: mu 10->14. Anchored on (a) Hickenlooper's 2020 margin of +9.3pp over Gardner, (b) Cook PR rating 'Solid D' / Sabato 'Safe D', (c) Colorado's leftward drift since 2020 -- Harris won CO ~+11 in 2024, (d) D-favorable 2026 generic ballot (~D+3 to D+6 in April 2026 Morning Consult / Ballotpedia averages, midterm-against-incumbent-GOP-president pattern), offset by (e) Hickenlooper's only-mediocre April 2026 favorability (43-43 per Colorado Newsline) and a soft primary challenge. Audit raised mu from 10 to 14 to better match recent presidential lean and the D-favored midterm environment -- prior 10 was too anchored on Hickenlooper's 2020 underperformance. Sigma 6pp held.
notes: Hickenlooper -D incumbent in a state Biden won by +13 (2020), Harris won by ~+11 (2024). His 2020 margin (+9.3) was below presidential lean; he tends to underperform top-of-ticket. Generic ballot D+3 to D+6 nationally, plus midterm penalty for Trump's GOP, suggests modest tailwind. Mu=+10 sits roughly at his 2020 mark with light upgrade. Sigma 6 wide because no head-to-head polls released yet.
